Name: Employee Directory
Description: Contains current employee records: names, job titles, departments, and email addresses. Use for questions about staff, org structure, or team membership.
ContextQuery: SELECT TOP 500 e.FirstName, e.LastName, e.Email, d.Name AS Department, e.JobTitle FROM dbo.Employees e JOIN dbo.Departments d ON e.DepartmentId = d.Id ORDER BY d.Name, e.LastName

Name: Product Catalog
Description: Contains the current product inventory: SKUs, names, prices, stock levels, and categories. Use for questions about products, availability, or pricing.
ContextQuery: SELECT TOP 500 p.Sku, p.Name, p.Price, p.StockQuantity, c.Name AS Category FROM dbo.Products p JOIN dbo.Categories c ON p.CategoryId = c.Id WHERE p.IsActive = 1 ORDER BY c.Name, p.Name
